name: Alchemy in Dungeon
short_description: Roguelike auto chess, delve into dungeons to slay monsters, collect materials, and craft the ultimate potion combinations!
detailed_description:
Introduction:
Roguelike auto chess, delve into dungeons to slay monsters, collect materials, and craft the ultimate potion combinations!

About this game:
Alchemist's Maze is a roguelike auto chess game where you play as a frail but brilliant alchemist. Use potions to aid your chosen adventurers as they explore dungeons. Slay monsters, gather materials, and throw them all into your beloved cauldron. Let's create the most powerful potion combinations together!
